task_completion.description: The agent has opened the FreeScout application in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout dashboard or mailbox view is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: The agent has located the ticket with the target subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket list shows a ticket with the subject 'Need VPN instructions'.

task_completion.description: The agent has opened the correct ticket from the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket details view is open, showing the subject 'Need VPN instructions' and the customer name 'Linda Chen'.

task_completion.description: The agent has drafted a polite reply to the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reply editor is open and contains a drafted message addressing the customer's request for VPN instructions.

task_completion.description: The agent has attached the required PDF document to the reply.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'VPN_Setup_Guide_v2.pdf' is visible as an attachment in the reply editor (e.g., listed below the text box or showing an attachment icon).

task_completion.description: The agent has successfully sent the reply with the attachment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket conversation thread shows the newly sent reply from the agent, and the attachment 'VPN_Setup_Guide_v2.pdf' is visible on the sent message.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeScout web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window with the FreeScout UI is visible throughout the process, and no terminal windows with curl or database commands are used to send the reply.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual file from the file system.
integrity.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog or file manager window is seen navigating to '/home/ga/Documents/' to select the PDF, or the attachment is clearly uploaded via the browser interface.

integrity.description: The agent drafted and sent the reply within the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reply is typed into the FreeScout reply box, not just written in a separate text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target ticket has the subject 'Need VPN instructions' and was submitted by 'Linda Chen'. The file to be attached is exactly named 'VPN_Setup_Guide_v2.pdf'.
